violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the area under the front counter have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
The grease trap was observed dripping onto the floor. Liquid waste must drain into a drain. Establishment is to repair grease trap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Liquid was observed pooling under the tile floor on the in front of the sales counter on the sales floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to assess reason for liquid pooling. Establishment is to continue to routinely sanitize area and maintain dry. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the area surrounding the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non- Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2025
The grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the milk low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2025
The grout throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
